name: Compose — Offer / Poll Expanded
description: Expanded sibling of [[compose]]: the same modal frame after the body editor has focus. Title + body inputs are visible above the keyboard; a mention helper row coaches the next move; a floating 'Create an Offer or Poll' pill exposes the secondary commit; a Popular Tags chip row sits between the editor and the option band; the bottom toolbar adds image/mention/hashtag insert affordances.
useCases: insert an offer or poll into a post
mention a company or job title

actionBar.note: Top action bar (modal, NOT navigation-bar/*). Leading `button/text` 'Cancel' (neutral), trailing `button/text` 'Post' (accent blue when valid; muted state shown in source pattern).

channelPicker.note: Channel picker row. Tap opens [[compose-channel]] as a bottom sheet — this row is the paired trigger for that overlay.

identity.note: Identity row (read-only, no chevron). Format is 'company · alias'.

props.placeholder: Keep it relevant. If the community flags your post for going off topic it will be invisible to the community.

body.note: Body input, separated from title by a hairline divider. Multiline. Placeholder is also coaching copy.

items.label: Tap here to mention companies or job titles and get answers faster

mentionHelper.note: Inline coaching row. NOT a `banner` — there's no container surface; just an inline `list/text` row with a leading `@` glyph. Tapping triggers the mention insert flow.

fab.note: Floating pill above the Popular Tags row, right-aligned. Uses `button/fab` with `appearance: secondary` (surfaceContainerHigh background, onSurface label). The structured-post entry is the canonical commit on this surface; Post in the top bar is finalize chrome (`button/text`), not a competing FAB — so the ≤1 FAB rule is satisfied.

tags.note: Popular Tags row. Uses `chip/tag` with `appearance: accent` — `sys.color.primaryContainer` background, `sys.color.primary` label (pale-blue surface + blue text). Tapping inserts the tag into the body, it does not toggle filter state. Leading 'Popular Tags:' neutral label precedes the row.

options.note: Option-toggle on the sunken surface band. Uses `button/check` medium (24px checkbox, 12-rank label) — same component as [[compose]] and [[compose-kr]].

toolbar.note: Bottom toolbar row — three leading `button/icon` triggers (image attach, `@` mention, `#` hashtag) with a trailing right-aligned 'Hide company name' checkbox row. The checkbox is on the same row only because of horizontal density; it does not belong to the insert toolbar.

rules: Top action bar is NOT a `navigation-bar` sub — same as [[compose]]. Cancel + Post are `button/text` chrome, not FABs.

The 'Create an Offer or Poll' floating pill is `button/fab` with `appearance: secondary` (neutral surface, not brand). It is the canonical commit on this surface; Post in the top bar is finalize chrome.
Mention helper row is `list/text` with a leading `@` glyph, NOT a `banner` — there is no container surface.
Popular Tags row uses `chip/tag` (informational), not `chip/filter` — tapping inserts, it does not toggle filter state.
The bottom toolbar's `Hide company name` checkbox shares the row with the insert triggers for layout density; do not conflate the two semantically.
Channel picker row is the paired trigger for [[compose-channel]] — that bottom sheet's trigger lives in this recipe.
